patch.value: Fix: pm close/close-many hard-failed without a reason via a generic, non-actionable error (P0 never-block)

governance.require_close_reason is enabled by default in all presets, so nearly every agent close hit a bare PmCliError that named the internal knob but never told the agent to pass --reason. Enriched both close.ts and close-many.ts errors with required/why/examples/nextSteps (incl. how to disable via pm config set governance-require-close-reason --policy disabled). Found by agent-UX audit (F1).
Shipped: actionable close-reason guidance in close.ts + close-many.ts (verified end-to-end). Resolution: never-block error now lists --reason usage, examples, and how to disable the knob.
